license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdp3i5qn
title: End-preparation of amplicon pools
author: Josh Quick

steps_raw.instruction: Set up the following reaction for each sample: Component Volume DNA amplicons (5ng/ul) 10 µL Nuclease-free water 2.5 µL Ultra II End Prep Reaction Buffer 1.75 µL Ultra II End Prep Enzyme Mix 0.75 µL Total 15 µL
Incubate at room temperature for 00:05:00 Incubate at 65 °C f for 00:05:00 Incubate on ice for 00:01:00
